---
name: demo-storytelling
description: Turn technical Agent Mode work into a clear live presentation narrative for audiences moving beyond inline suggestions.
---

# Demo Storytelling Skill

Use this skill when summarizing demo value for an audience.

## Message

Inline suggestions help with code completion. Agent Mode helps with engineering outcomes.

## Structure

1. Start with the old habit: inline suggestions.
2. Show repo instructions and context.
3. Use Plan Mode before edits.
4. Run an Agent Council for better reasoning.
5. Let Agent Mode change code and validate.
6. End with a handoff the team could review.
